claims.statement: Worker runtime account/session/content records do not include real-name, personal email, or phone identity fields.
Worker app auth/session records are structured without stored IP or browser/device fingerprint fields.
Push payloads are reduced to wake/action references and exclude message-body or sender-context metadata.
Content responses in worker runtime redact direct account IDs and expose actor identifiers in actor mode.
Billing-gated worker sign-in is denied when membership pass is missing, invalid, inactive, or verification is unavailable.
